name: Dorfromantik: The Board Game
description: Dorfromantik: The Board Game is the Spiel-des-Jahres-2023-winning cooperative tile-laying adaptation of the cozy German video game — draw and place hex tiles to weave together forests, fields, rivers, and villages, completing quests as adjacent groups grow. A campaign mode unlocks new tiles, achievements, and pieces over many plays. Quiet, meditative, gently addictive.
